column1: # Maps the heterogeneous drug-class / antibiotic-class strings emitted by the
# different AMR tools (and harmonized by hAMRonize) onto a single label that the
# frontend groups and colours by. Match is case-insensitive on `raw`.
# Anything unmatched falls through to "Other" and is logged by build_record.py
# so the vocabulary can be extended deliberately rather than silently.
